pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 17; keeping 1.8 would result in incompatible bytecode or missing language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version from 2.7.4 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces; Spring Boot 3.x is required for Java 17+ compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud version from 2021.0.4 to 2023.0.6 to match the new Spring Boot 3.x release train.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; using it would cause dependency resolution failures or runtime class conflicts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the 'release' configuration to the maven-compiler-plugin to enforce cross-compilation targeting Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using 'source' and 'target' is deprecated in newer Maven Compiler Plugin versions; 'release' is the standard for Java 9+ to ensure API compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated 'source' and 'target' compiler configurations with the modern 'release' configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in favor of 'release' for Java 9+; keeping them may cause warnings or incorrect compilation behavior in newer plugin versions.
